use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF CLINICALLY IMPORTANT HYPOTENSION OCCURRING IN THE SETTING OF ANESTHESIA

indications.text:
Ephedrine Sulfate Injection is indicated for the treatment of clinically important hypotension
occurring in the setting of anesthesia.
